description: Task dispatch prompt for Codex executive session. Assembles task metadata (id, path, intent, scope, risk, model posture) and description into a structured spec that the Codex session receives via tmux send-keys. KNOWN LIMITATION: the probe runs with tools disabled, so action-taking is observed as stated intent, not execution. The probe wrapper is deliberately behavior-neutral; judges grade substance (was the work done or handed back), not phrasing.
